description: Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) is a U.S. Department of Energy national laboratory. On this domain, the developer-facing public integration surface found is the Daymet weather-data access service hosted by ORNL DAAC.
summary: ornl.gov exposes one documented public HTTP API surface: the Daymet Single Pixel Extraction Tool API, with an OpenAPI spec and no authentication requirement found; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found for the domain.

surfaces.name: Daymet Single Pixel Extraction Tool API
